brandHeadline: Sign in to continue your work.
brandBody: A composable workflow ERP — every task knows where it's going.

error.rateLimited: Too many attempts, try again later

notFound.title: Workspace not found
notFound.body: We couldn't load this workspace. Check the address, or switch to another workspace.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: Enter your work email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
reset.magicAlt: Email me a one-time sign-in link instead

magic.title: Email a sign-in link
magic.subtitle: Enter your work email and we'll send you a one-time link to sign in — no password needed.

sent.title: Check your inbox
sent.body: If an account matches that email, a link is on its way. It expires soon, so use it promptly.

newPassword.title: Set a new password
newPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.

success.title: Password updated
success.body: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with it.

error.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
error.missingToken: This reset link is missing its token. Request a new one.

magicLink.missingToken: This sign-in link is missing its token.

error.title: Sign-in link invalid
error.body: This sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

error.rateLimited: Too many attempts, try again later
